title: Pikachu Pals Haunted
description:
Traverse to catch them all in a new cobblemon let's play! Updated to 1.21.1 for Cobblemon 1.6.1! Over 200 mods and new world with towny plots! Now with megas and legendaries that spawn!

Several cobblemon addons to enhance your experience!
body:
# Pikachu Pals: Haunted

**Server is now open with a spooky theme!**

![Legendary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a641684cc8f53691a518d1a0f36d1e22aa42d226_0.webp)

This epic Cobblemon survival gameplay welcomes all players. When you join, you will arrive in Pikachu Pals RPG Town. Everyone will have a starter kit.

1. Town plots are now open!
2. You can set up to 4x homes and use warp scrolls for additional homes. 
2. Check out the Pokecenter at spawn.  
4. Build a player shop, gym, or restaurant with town permits! 
5. Press J to open the Jobs+ Remastered menu and select 2x starting jobs.

Spooky Mobs <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qJmNnmxRrpc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 💰 [Jobs+ Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/jobs-remastered)
10 Unique Jobs, Leveling up, Job Coins and Power Ups

# 📒 [Collectors Album](https://modrinth.com/mod/collectors-album/gallery)
Collect cards, fill your album with over 100 custom cards and gain extra perks for your character.

# 💫 [Shiny Notifications](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-spawn-notification)
Never miss a shiny again!

# ⚔️ [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
Fun Melee combat system from Minecraft Dungeons with new weapons.

# 🪴 [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight/gallery)
Cozy Decor, basic crops, feasts, kitchenware, more decor, and food variety
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BY-c9gAiqMM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🔍 [Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav/gallery)
A sidemod that adds an item that lets you check spawns of cobblemon

# 📔 [Ars Nouveau](https://www.arsnouveau.wiki/)
Craft spells and construct magical automations.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CMznPcN1wG8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🎏 [Variety of fishing Content:](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Main_Page) 
E.g. Aquaculture, Cobblemon, Tide, and Little Joys
Fishing spots appear randomly near the shore, guaranteeing a quick catch and some treasure.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HUD1ltMD2AM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
## 🏆 Fishing tournaments are commonly on the weekends.

# ❤️‍🩹 [Twilight Forest](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest/screenshots)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YsdYIUAcDHo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 🏘️ [Towny Now Open and Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims)
With clientside Xaero's Map it makes custom hexcode and claiming easy. 

# [Shaders Resourcepacks & Optimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
1. Complementary Shaders Unbound
2. FerriteCore

![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d053bd621de162b3bc3848ac1700f4e21f272ce.png)![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d053bd621de162b3bc3848ac1700f4e21f272ce.png)![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d053bd621de162b3bc3848ac1700f4e21f272ce.png)

Neoforge Server Hosted by Bisect 24/7 version 1.21.1 
Recommended Ram 7gb +

The purpose of this community server is to progess with mods that make the player's experience more fun and challenging. Check us out! Join discord to apply.
